topics: Basic Structure of computers: - Functional units - Basic operational concepts

Endianness. CISC vs RISC architectures:- RISC Introduction - Assembly Language, Assembler directives, Assembling. Programming concepts - Program flow, Branching, Conditional statements, Loops, Arrays, Function calls
Instruction execution cycle. Machine language - Instructions, addressing modes, Stored program concept. Evolution of the RISC Architecture
Hazards, Solving Data/Control Hazards, Performance Analysis
Caches - basic concepts, Cache mapping, Cache replacement, Multiple-Level Caches, Reducing Miss Rate, Write Policy

Embedded I/O Systems -Embedded I/O, General Purpose I/O, Serial I/O, Other Peripherals. Suggestion on Project Topics Use simulators such as Ripes (https://github.com/mortbopet/Ripes) / GEM5 (https://www.gem5.org/) implement components of computer systems such as Various Cache organization and study the effect, Solutions to hazards, TLBs
